source_pr.title: planner/core: pass the elems info to fieldtype only for exchanger
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?
Problem Summary:
TiFlash must know the elems info of enum type when decoding the enum data. Especially in MPP mode, we can't get the table schema after shuffle, then we must pass the elems to the tipb plans.

### What is changed and how it works?

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/tipb`: https://github.com/pingcap/tipb/pull/217

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- planner/core: pass the elems info to fieldtype only for exchanger

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select t1.b from t t1 join t t2 on t1.a = t2.a order by t1.b").Check(testkit.Rows("aca", "bca", "zca")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select t1.b from t t1 join t t2 on t1.a = t2.a order by t1.b").Check(testkit.Rows("aca", "bca", "zca")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select t1.b from t t1 join t t2 on t1.a = t2.a order by t1.b").Check(testkit.Rows("aca", "bca", "zca")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select t1.b from t t1 join t t2 on t1.a = t2.a order by t1.b").Check(testkit.Rows("aca", "bca", "zca")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
